skills.name: skill-example-hello
skills.description: Minimal seed skill with no dependencies — exercises the registry happy path.

skills.name: skill-example-pinned-dep
skills.description: Seed skill with a minimum-version dependency — exercises @>= constraint parsing.

skills.name: skill-example-with-dep
skills.description: Seed skill that depends on skill-example-hello — exercises unpinned dependency resolution.

skills.name: use-smart-skill
skills.description: Create new Smart Skills (CCCCC-structured: Core / Context / Category / Concept / Command) with an embedded self-learning brain. Provides scaffold and lint scripts, templates, and step-by-step workflows. Use when creating a skill, scaffolding a skill, migrating a flat skill, refactoring skill structure, adding self-learning memory to a skill, or when a SKILL.md exceeds ~300 lines.
